title: Create: Duxo's More Renewables
description: Adds some more renewables to Create Mod
body:
# Create: Duxo's More Renewables!
Ever wanted to Duplicate- I MEAN make some items renewable in create? Well I'm sure you did!

Adds Renewable Automation for:
<details>
<summary>v1.0</summary>
  Ancient Debris, Diamonds, Iron, Gold
</details>

This Datapack has Full JEI Support (and probably other Recipe Searching Mods). This Datapacl REQUIRES the create mod!


<details>
<summary>Q&A</summary>

Is [Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly) supported?
  It should work but it is not officially supported nor tested

Does it work with [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)?
  Just like Create Fly, it should work but it isn't officially supported

Will there be backports to versions like 1.20.1?
  Nope! But it should work as all the current recipes use blocks that are on that version so unless 1.20.1 stops getting Create Updates and I start adding recipes for new contraptions then not all recipes will work BUT all the recipes using contraptions that are in those versions will should get the new recipes!  

</details>
